summary: Comprehensive testing of Sales Dashboard with reorganized structure completed successfully. All 6 required features working perfectly: Executive Summary (6 KPIs), Pending Follow-Ups with URGENT highlighting, Price Margin (5% only), SPIFF breakdown by brand columns, Performance sections, and Update Data functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Backend API includes 'avg_sales_cycle_days' in test but was removed from requirements
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - field not used in frontend

passed_tests: Backend API - All 11 endpoints (100% success rate)
Executive Summary - All 6 KPIs displaying correctly: Total Revenue ($197,316), Total Commission ($22,383.39), Closed Deals (20), Closing Rate (41.7%), Total Visits (48), Average Ticket ($9,865.8)
Pending Follow-Ups - URGENT badges in red for dates within 7 days (5 urgent follow-ups found)
Price Margin Analysis - All 3 cards showing 5% rate only: Sales (2), Revenue ($21,645), Commission ($1,082.25)
SPIFF Commission Breakdown - Total SPIFF ($4,482.81) with brand columns APCO X, Samsung, Mitsubishi, Other
Sales Analysis - Unit Type Distribution and Revenue by Unit Type charts working
Performance Trends - Deal Status (SALE/LOST/PENDING) and Monthly Revenue Trend charts working
Recent Sales Records - Complete table with all 8 columns (Name, City, Unit Type, Ticket Value, Comm %, Commission, SPIFF, Status)
Update Data button - Functional with SharePoint integration and loading state
Commission calculation - Correctly using Commission Value column for SALE rows
Pay period filtering - Working with bi-weekly periods
Date range filtering - All filters (week, 2weeks, month, year) working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All 6 required sections working with proper styling and functionality
